## Articles tagged "On-Premises" (1)

- [Hybrid AKS: Bridging Cloud and On-Prem with Azure Arc](https://daily-devops.net/posts/hybrid-aks-on-prem-azure-arc/): Practical patterns for connecting AKS to on-prem: ExpressRoute, VPN connectivity, Azure Arc management, DNS resolution, and identity federation.
